RequestBody.description: Code interpreter agent for data analysis and visualization.

ResponseBody.name: MyAgent
ResponseBody.description: Code interpreter agent for data analysis and visualization.

RequestBody.input: Could you please create bar chart in TRANSPORTATION sector for the operating profit from the uploaded csv file and provide file to me?

output.code:
import pandas as pd, os, matplotlib.pyplot as plt, seaborn as sns
path="/mnt/data/assistant-9BiBnp7oGLPTD3cqKQbuVY-synthetic_500_quarterly_results.csv"
df=pd.read_csv(path)
df.head(), df.columns, df.shape

# clean numeric columns with commas and percent
num_cols=['revenue','operating_expenses','operating_profit','depreciation','interest','profit_before_tax','tax','net_profit','EPS','profit_TTM','EPS_TTM']
for c in num_cols:
    df[c]=df[c].astype(str).str.replace(',','',regex=False)
    df[c]=pd.to_numeric(df[c], errors='coerce')
df['operating_profit_margin']=df['operating_profit_margin'].astype(str).str.replace('%','',regex=False)
df['operating_profit_margin']=pd.to_numeric(df['operating_profit_margin'], errors='coerce')/100
transport=df[df['sector'].str.upper().eq('TRANSPORTATION')].copy()
transport[['name','operating_profit']].head(), transport.shape

import matplotlib.ticker as mtick
transport_sorted=transport.sort_values('operating_profit', ascending=False)
plt.figure(figsize=(10,5))
sns.barplot(data=transport_sorted, x='name', y='operating_profit', color='#1f77b4')
plt.title('Operating Profit - Transportation Sector')
plt.xlabel('Company')
plt.ylabel('Operating Profit')
plt.xticks(rotation=30, ha='right')
plt.tight_layout()
out_png="/mnt/data/transportation_operating_profit_bar_chart.png"
plt.savefig(out_png, dpi=200)
out_png

content.text:
I created a bar chart for **Operating Profit** for companies in the **TRANSPORTATION** sector from your uploaded CSV.

Download the chart here:  
[Download the bar chart (PNG)](sandbox:/mnt/data/transportation_operating_profit_bar_chart.png)
